commit.message:
8385369

Hi all,

  please review this change that fixes a crash during concurrent bitmap clearing: regions and their associated bitmaps may be uncommitted after freeing them in a gc that runs during that time, while they are being cleared.

This obviously crashes the VM.

There is a test, but it is not very reliable and I did not manage to further improve it - in one run it crashes in <1% of cases, in another in almost 10% of cases. Feel free to ask me to remove it.

Testing: new test, gha

Thanks,
  Thomas
